Notes: Limits, squeeze theorem, regions of continuity.

Linearization and the differential. Connects to JfJf​.

Notes: All chain rule cases. Dependency diagrams.

Inner Product Spaces and Gram-Schmidt — Kobotis

Watch before Week 4. Best 17-minute intuition build.
Inner products, adjoint, self-adjoint matrices, full theorem.

Notes: First and second order Taylor, HfHf​ in T2T2​. 35m.

Notes: Critical points, second derivative test via det⁡(Hf)det(Hf​).

Notes: Lagrange multipliers in full. Most exam-relevant video of Week 6.

Video Title: Double Integrals over Polar Regions — Prof. Leonard
Notes: Polar coordinates, translating rectangular to polar. 3h25m.

Notes: Spherical and cylindrical change of variables. 3h20m.
